name: Eric Greitens
subject: the most important email I've ever sent you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

Earlier today a video surfaced making several false statements about my military service as a Navy SEAL. I knew politics was hardball, but I never expected a nameless, faceless person would upload a video to YouTube attacking my patriotism, questioning my service, and insinuating that somehow I skirted responsibilities to my country. The great comfort I find in this video is how horribly false, incorrect, and flat out cowardly the whole thing is.

Correcting the record of this video and setting the record straight has little to do with my campaign, and everything to do with not allowing a coward to distort an honorable military record. This shouldn't happen to any veteran. These kinds of acts are exactly why many good people choose not to participate in the political process. I welcome this fight because it is an important one. Good people have to be able to participate in politics.

Insiders have a lot to lose, and so they set out to assassinate the personal lives and reputations of good people who want to serve. If they believe that some internet video full of lies and innuendos will intimidate me, well, it's further proof they don't know me.

So let me be clear. I'm proud of every day I served, and I will release every page of my military record. Every fitness report, every award citation, and people will be able to judge the record for themselves. It is more than 200 pages of documents and we will release them all. In the meantime here are a few of the pertinent records and documents. View it at [http://ericgreitens.com/record.pdf](http://link.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=Au-2BxKe7ytSSIjprN1SaltfcgHB0jz-2BETRR0IjHEKZP-2FBkuT7-2BS2-2Bb5J1oWGAzCCH_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPWR-2BHuXgMhyDWyLc4OIqMr01k1lE0c-2BT-2BublxgIOq6ZCsGRHdPbwd9cccFBB48qQ2PQ54315g-2FNKh4S7sebHfQ-2FSDDg-2FfuTwyFvbq5jShqS3D9fvUitZPI-2FUf2Ot7T6Z9-2FASCkbySsECAgkGQSBDGsJOGVu-2BldWcX7NVw2YGaKSSzz1tUtSAMMVHTLPxS5ymizSrTU151H-2BWwHBDiOlTrBJMeM4cS6Dr3xRw2c54pLJP4Z24W8J-2FCALrcT6rwomTqhsL-2BKWWQPvnXPxOJdB456kYa-2BDSvSB4xAgRRtrc56lD0msmqCjWwisbTMRZCALfSE37k0ZLWLu-2BSmrQZo34vsVN-2BrcVzav3Bt7-2FVBccKhT89TF5cMDpjzGkk5gTPhOHUr5f6VaQhIYvWihyrN7MsARrrB-2FPZTrJpUSxHhmQdIO2vaZc-2B6lggyMfFZg-2Ba89hLQ-3D-3D)

In the next 24 hours, we are also releasing a video with independent citations from my military record of everything that is false -- which is literally almost everything stated in the video. Their video is a total distortion of reality. But I will not ask people to take my word for it -- we are compiling the documents to discredit this failed attack, line by line.

A few moments ago former Navy SEAL and now Congressman Ryan Zinke alerted me that when asked about this situation he plans to say the following:

"As a former SEAL Team SIX Commander and member of Congress, Eric has earned my strongest possible endorsement. He is a highly decorated combat veteran with a proven record of leading from the front. He never quits nor shys away from toughest missions. His highly decorated career is one of service above self and sacrifice for others. Absurd attacks against anyone who has fought for his country are shameless. America needs leadership that is committed to defending the Constitution and fighting for the values that have made this Country great. The Great State of Missouri would be well served by sending a SEAL leader to serve as Governor."

Soon, we will distribute many more statements from fellow SEALs and military personnel who served alongside me. I'm comforted by how many have called, texted or emailed to express their shock and outrage over this absurd attack on my reputation.

Finally, you might be wondering: 'who from the military community would be aiding the career politicians?' As a young officer I once had to make a hard call, and confront an officer senior to me and other SEALs who were using cocaine and ecstasy and selling drugs to young sailors. It was the right thing to do. Some of my colleagues have never forgiven me for that. It adversely affected members of the SEAL community who were their friends. They blame me for that. And a few of them have continued to trash my service ever since. If that's the price for doing what is right, so be it. I believed then, and still believe today that it was the right thing to do. We are also releasing the military documents associated with this unfortunate situation that affirm I did exactly the right thing. I'll leave you with what a fellow Navy SEAL officer said about that situation:

"I was a Lieutenant for SEAL Team One in 2004. I was present in Thailand when Eric, a fellow Navy SEAL, had the fortitude to stand up to another SEAL Officer--senior to him--who was using drugs and selling drugs to young sailors. Doing so earned Eric a few bitter enemies, but it was the right thing to do. Eric's actions were morally courageous and made the Navy and the SEAL Teams better. His military record is both distinguished and honorable. Anyone saying otherwise is not being truthful." \-- Carter Gaffney, former Navy SEAL

Thank you for your support. I cannot tell you how grateful I am to have you on our team. I'm new to politics, and I cannot promise you that I'll make a perfect candidate for office--though I love the energy and momentum we've generated thus far--but I can assure you that you will be proud to stand with me every day.

Eric

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We cannot wait
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I just left the stage at the final debate before 14 caucuses and primaries take place over the next three weeks. And the message I sent to those who have yet to vote is that the American people cannot afford to wait for transformational change.
We've heard a lot of folks in the political establishment, and tonight on the stage, say that our ideas are too bold. That the best we can do right now is incremental change. But as my dear friend Senator Nina Turner has said, **_"the future of our country is too important to go from yes we can to no we can 't."_**
I think our campaign's message is why we left Iowa beating everyone's expectations, won by huge margins in New Hampshire, and why we will do so well in the 14 contests over the next three weeks. But time is running out, and that's why I have to ask you directly:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign tonight and we will win the Democratic primary, the White House, and take our country back from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-cant-wait?refcode=em160211 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-cant-wait?refcode=em160211")
The truth is, the forces aligned against us in this primary are too big and too powerful for any one candidate to take on alone. The only way we win is if we stand together. If we are divided, the big money interests will win.
These emails are how we fund this campaign, and that is why your contribution tonight is so important.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-cant-wait?refcode=em160211 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-cant-wait?refcode=em160211")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

across the country to make election night a success.

Just as we had in
Iowa and New Hampshire, our Camp Cruz in South Carolina houses
volunteers who travel to help knock doors, make phone calls, and
connect with voters.

The reason we are

restore their freedoms - especially their religious liberty and

opportunities for all who aspire to work hard and provide for
their families.

Rick Tyler

name: Ruth Sherlock
subject: It's up to us, and there's not much time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33507106:s3iRfpCNs:m:1:876315805:44D152C062838423F8ED77CA958C533A:r)
---

Peter,

Good afternoon from South Carolina. My name is Ruth Sherlock and I serve as Dr. Carson's State Director here in the Palmetto State.

**[The"First in the South" Primary on February 20th is now just 8 days away and I'll be very direct -- we need your urgent help.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33507106:s3iRfpCNs:m:1:876315805:44D152C062838423F8ED77CA958C533A:r)**

This has been a campaign of ups and downs, and much of it has been driven by the pundits and the political class. They get to declare who is "winning" and who should be ignored.

**But they're forgetting one very important thing -- this election won't be decided by them.

This election will be decided by the American people, state by state. So far, two states have spoken and here in South Carolina, we're next -- so this is our singular focus.**

Over the past months we've built a massive grassroots operation, and now it's go time. Dr. Carson will be here almost every day between now and February 20th, doing everything from small meetings with faith leaders to large public rallies.

In addition to the personal campaigning of Dr. Carson, his family and our entire team, we also have an advertising blitz underway to reach people directly in their homes.

**[So I ask for your help. Your donation today of just $3 or more will directly fund our efforts here in South Carolina, and we really need it. Our opponents are spending millions and millions of dollars and we need the resources to compete. Will you donate $3 now?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33507106:s3iRfpCNs:m:1:876315805:44D152C062838423F8ED77CA958C533A:r)**

From the very beginning, this race has been completely unpredictable and you can bet that there are plenty more surprises on the way.

One surprise that no one in the media is expecting is a strong performance by Dr. Carson.

They want to write him off, but we have a very real opportunity to reset the race and show them that "We the People" are in fact running the show.

[**So Peter, please help by making a secure online donation of just $3 now.
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33507106:s3iRfpCNs:m:1:876315805:44D152C062838423F8ED77CA958C533A:r)
We're doing everything we can here on the ground, but I know that Dr. Carson's support base is much bigger than one state. You are one of millions of supporters around the country and if we can all band together and send in a few dollars, we can have an incredible impact.

On behalf of our whole team here in South Carolina, thank you.

Sincerely,

Ruth Sherlock
South Carolina State Director
Ben Carson for President

subject: reality check
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46194759:6tczeirVN:m:1:1349778030:915B875DD332F383CAA4B2A6F0B12A73:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Did you get the below email from Ted Cruz? We think Ted's pretty much right about Donald Trump: He'll never be able to beat Hillary Clinton, he doesn't have the temperament to be president, and he has a host of disturbingly liberal positions on economics, abortion, and other issues. **But Ted 's trying to mislead you about everything else: He only wishes it were a two-man race, and he will never beat Hillary Clinton.** The fact is that only one candidate has a real policy agenda for America's future: It's Marco. And if you look at the delegate count \-- **Trump 17, Cruz 11, Marco 10** \-- plus who has a national organization, the real race is between Trump, Cruz, and Marco. **[> >Click here to donate now<<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46194759:6tczeirVN:m:1:1349778030:915B875DD332F383CAA4B2A6F0B12A73:r)** Remember: This isn't the first time Cruz's campaign has lied about his opponents. And the most important question -- who's the conservative who can beat Hillary next fall? -- the answer is clear, too: It's Marco, not Ted. How do we know that? There are mounds of polling suggesting it, but I'll make two other points. First of all, **there 's only one candidate the Democrats are relentlessly attacking right now. It's Marco.** They've got protesters trying to troll him at practically every campaign stop, they obsess over every word he says, and their Super PACs are trying to undermine him long before he gets the nomination. Second, **Marco has a positive, conservative vision for the 21st Century that can reach new voters.** He knows the struggles hard-working American families are facing in the 21st Century, and he has the ideas to help them -- tax reform that will give working families a big income boost to raise their children, ideas to bring down the cost of college, and the strength, expertise, and consistency we need to keep America safe. Hillary Clinton, Bernie Sanders, and the Democrats are terrified of him, and their own behavior shows it. So don't buy what Ted's trying to sell you. Just look at what the Democrats do and say, look at the delegate count, and [_**go here to chip in to help Marco be our nominee and beat Hillary Clinton.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46194759:6tczeirVN:m:1:1349778030:915B875DD332F383CAA4B2A6F0B12A73:r) Thanks for your support, Terry SullivanCampaign ManagerMarco Rubio for President

---
| \------- Forwarded message ----------From: ted@tedcruz.org (urgent) [mailto:ted@tedcruz.org]Sent: Wednesday, February 10, 2016 4:49 PMSubject: let me be blunt about Trump Ted Cruz Personal Email -- May Include Privileged Communication

Friend,

Do you have a few minutes to read my email?

I hope you will stop what you are doing for just a moment and let me explain...

The results of the first two states are in, and it's clear that we are down to a two person race -- me vs. Donald Trump!

You also know -- the winner will take on Hillary Clinton.

Friend, let me be blunt. I can beat Hillary Clinton. Donald can't.

That is why I am asking you -- one of my closest and most loyal supporters -- will you redouble your support for me today?

I need you now more than ever, and let me tell you why.

When I first announced my campaign, Heidi and I committed that we would run an issues oriented, positive campaign. Unfortunately, my friend, Donald Trump, didn't make that same commitment.

While Donald continues with personal attacks -- and vulgar profanities -- I do not intend to respond, but that won't stop Donald.

He is so rattled by my surge in the polls, our victory in Iowa, and our strong finish in New Hampshire that he has decided to continue his scorched earth campaign in an attempt to burn down everyone and everything in his path.

I can't fault Donald for this...it's the only way he can distract voters from his record:
Support for Hillary-style healthcare;
Support for partial birth abortion;
Support for bank bailouts;
Support for Obama stimulus; and
Enthusiastic embrace of eminent domain.
Friend, will you help me set the record straight?

Without your help, he might get away with it...and if he does, say hello to President Hillary Clinton.

That's why I need your immediate help.

As I write this email to you, I'm being briefed that our Iowa and New Hampshire campaigns have taken a significant toll on my campaign budget. As of today, I'm still $490,700 short of my mid-month budget for February.

With South Carolina voting next in just 10 days \-- I can't afford to come up short. That's why I'm turning to you again. Will you help me make up the difference by using one of the secure links below?

MAKE THE DIFFERENCE: I will help with $5 >>

MAKE THE DIFFERENCE: I will help with $35 >>

MAKE THE DIFFERENCE: I will help with $50 >>

MAKE THE DIFFERENCE: I will help with $250 >>

MAKE THE DIFFERENCE: I will help with $500 >>

MAKE THE DIFFERENCE: I will help with $2700 >>

You can make a HUGE impact on this campaign and help me win this nomination with an IMMEDIATE contribution -- no matter how small.

There is great strength in numbers.

With your personal contribution, you'll also be sending a big message to Donald Trump that tearing others down and misleading voters is not the best way to unite conservatives and make America great again.

Friend, I'll set the record straight on Donald's false attacks, secure the Republican nomination, AND DEFEAT HILLARY, but I can only get there with your continued help.

This is our time!

Together, we will reignite liberty in America.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz
---

body:
We have to keep up | Friend --

In early January, our opponent's campaign started to outspend us in states like Iowa and New Hampshire.

There's no reason to expect they're going to slow down anytime soon -- least of all after last night’s debate. They outraised us by $5 million in January, and their campaign just announced they raised more than $6 million the day after the New Hampshire primary.

**In tough moments like these, I’m so grateful I can depend on this team, because we've got to start catching up, and we've got to do it now. subject: Pushing ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

---
Friend -- When I got into this race, I knew it would be a tough fight. We were squaring off in a competitive primary, facing an opponent who had been building a campaign for nearly six years. Right now, thanks to the support of people like you, we've closed the gap and done what many said was impossible. We've tied the race, and we've never been closer to victory. **But, ****Friend******,** we have to keep pushing ahead: A recent poll showed that more than half of Pennsylvania Democrats are still undecided about who they're voting for in this primary election.** **[If we're going to win, I need your support right now to help reach as many voters as possible before Election Day. Can I count on you for a $5 gift today? Your donation has never counted more.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5032275492661624832/-4436586592680804352?refcode=e20160212&refcode2=e20160212nd&amount=5)** | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5032275492661624832/-4436586592680804352?refcode=e20160212&refcode2=e20160212nd&amount=5)
---
This is a tough campaign because it's so important. Control of the U.S. Senate will come down to Pennsylvania -- but if we don't stay on track now, we won't have the resources to reach enough of those undecided voters before our primary.
We've made unprecedented gains in the last few weeks, and with your help, we can and will continue surging ahead towards victory.
**[The primary election will be here before we know it, and I'm counting on your support right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5032275492661624832/-4436586592680804352?refcode=e20160212&refcode2=e20160212nd&amount=5) **[**Make a contribution to our campaign today. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5032275492661624832/-4436586592680804352?refcode=e20160212&refcode2=e20160212nd&amount=5)
We've come a long way since launching this campaign, and I am so grateful for all of your support. **Now let 's finish strong.**
Thanks,
Katie

name: Mike Rubino, Director, Team Trump Virginia
subject: Walk & Talk for Donald Trump
body:
Peter --

There are only 17 days between now and the Virginia, and we need your help to guarantee a huge victory for Mr. Trump. We’re asking that you reach at least 25 new voters a day - everyday - until the election in one of 2 very easy ways: Walking or Talking.

Talking:

Come to one of our Trump Call Centers. They run 7 days a week from 9 AM to 9 PM. Bring your own laptop or tablet, as well as a cell phone if you have one. We’ll keep you fed and provide you with equipment if you don’t have any of your own.

We have offices in these locations:

Glen Allen
10015 West Broad St
Glen Allen, VA

Moneta
400 Scruggs Rd
Moneta, VA

Newport News
705B Mobjack Pl
Newport News, VA

Virginia Beach
4933 Jeanne St
Virginia Beach, VA

*There are 5 locations in Northern Virginia that are open evenings. For a complete list of dates, times and locations, visit the Virginia For Trump Facebook Page <https://www.facebook.com/vafortrump/events>.

**We also schedule several calling parties in homes, restaurants, hotels, and offices near you! See the Virginia For Trump Facebook Page <https://www.facebook.com/vafortrump/events> for a complete list.

You can also make calls from home, even if you don't live in Virginia! If you have a Mac, PC, or Tablet device, we can set you up to call from home. Just reply to this email and we will get you set up in a minute.

Walking:

Go door to door to find our supporters. We can provide you with materials and walk lists for neighborhoods near you. We are now organizing groups of volunteers to join Team Trump.

So please reply to this email letting us know how you can help by Walking & Talking for Trump, and we’ll get you started!

Mike Rubino

State Director; Team Trump Virginia

-------------------------------------------------------|
| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. |
-------------------------------------------------------|
Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. - United States

name: Jonathan McConnell
subject: “True Reformer”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend -- I’m honored that our campaign has earned the support of conservative immigration policy group NumbersUSA, who named us “true reformers” who’ll solve our nation’s immigration crisis once and for all. But you wouldn’t know it if you read what our opponent -- the Establishment’s pick -- is spreading around. As his poll numbers continue to plummet, he’s begun making false accusations about our campaign and what we believe. But we know the truth: it’s career politicians -- not grassroots conservatives like you and me -- that caused this immigration crisis, and we’re going to fix it. [**We need leaders who will walk the walk, not just tell you want to hear during an election year. If you agree, add your name and join our campaign today.**](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/time_to_act?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160212_1&n=1) **To be clear: under no circumstance have I ever, nor will I ever support Amnesty. In fact, NumbersUSA rates me significantly higher than 37-year incumbent Richard Shelby.** The nation has been talking about immigration and the growing number of illegal immigrants for decades now, but career Establishment politicians like Richard Shelby have refused to act. Shelby talks a big game on securing our borders during election season, but takes big donations and endorsements from the Chamber of Commerce, which has always pushed for Amnesty. **As your next Senator, I will work hard to secure the border and protect American jobs for American workers.** That’s why our campaign has been given a top rating by NumbersUSA, a leading conservative immigration policy group. [ **Say you’re with us, Friend** ](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/time_to_act?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160212_1&n=2) In these final weeks of the campaign the negative attacks from Shelby and his cronies will only increase, but if we stick together and fight for what we know is right, we can -- and will -- win. Thank you for your support, Jonathan

---

body:
Super Tuesday is in 18 days. | Friend --

Last night was one of my last debates with Senator Sanders before much of the country votes on Super Tuesday. I hope I made you proud out there, just like I try to do every single day of this campaign.

**[At this pivotal moment, I need to know you're with me. Will you chip in $1 to help launch our Super Tuesday Fund?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ3MTAzMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMDg0MzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Super Tuesday is 18 days away: We'll have a dozen primaries and caucuses with more than 900 delegates at stake -- it's an important moment for our campaign, and we need to be ready for it. That means opening offices, scaling up a massive voter turnout operation, and raising the resources necessary to compete with Senator Sanders on television -- he outspent us 3-to-1 in New Hampshire, and we can't let that happen again.

subject: 1.2 million voter contacts!
body:
| [](http://www.robportman.com/winter_warriors?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_2mil_contacts&n=1) Peter -- Yesterday in Toledo, one of our Winter Warriors knocked on the door of the 1.2 millionth voter we've contacted since May 1st of last year! I'm proud of our team of hundreds of volunteers and interns who have worked tirelessly to help us build the best grassroots organization in the history of Ohio. With your help, we've opened 6 offices, launched 5 coalitions, and received the endorsements of over 15,000 conservatives across Ohio.

[](http://www.robportman.com/winter_warriors?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_2mil_contacts&n=2) This year's election is going to be tough -- and that's why our grassroots team is crucial to winning in November. National Democrats have said that the path to winning the Senate Majority and the White House runs through Ohio. And that's why they've already spent over $1 million attacking me on TV across Ohio. This election is about reasserting American leadership and our place in the world to protect America at a dangerous time. It is about restoring the American dream at home, for all Ohioans, through common sense conservative policies that will create more and better paying jobs for Ohio families. It is about bringing back opportunity and the hopefulness that has always characterized Ohio.

Governor Strickland had his chance and he failed Ohio. Under his watch, Ohio lost over 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. Now Ted Strickland wants to double down and promote the same failed policies in the U.S. Senate—the same ones that hurt Ohio families, raised taxes, caused healthcare prices to skyrocket, and crushed small businesses with burdensome regulations. Thank you for your support! Please watch our Winter Warriors in action and sign up to help: [http://www.robportman.com/winter_warriors](http://www.robportman.com/winter_warriors?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_2mil_contacts&n=3) All best,
Rob Portman [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_2mil_contacts&n=4)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_2mil_contacts&n=5)[

Peter,

We've taken the false, slanderous, absurd accusations that were made in the attack video, and rebutted them point by point in this [video](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAaban164tTp-2FTjpcF-2FG8KJdPJX2RBI509i-2BZ3ZvIEjGM-2FXF_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23yn7k2e2s7Mm-2FU4KaBti8eNdbzvvCO9a6Khi03O-2FPWvCfX75Ps9CzuOl0vHtHt8UrwHNUg2BM14nDyRx8Oq1bVZOHjlePsvcTRxRMHuJWFg5rl96JW8gBLMYLIs9m9UE4HcKgcAV99ulG447yixSs-2Fl3uxIaI0gaRlCXT9R4aTQ9lts41qoiMiMOdot7-2BblXJ3dNwdokr1nmjDLwOTP-2FfZBgzgmxiEOh5bS-2Br4A8e97UfeGBJ-2BW34zZpOHzmmNEo0jOnEm3tsvGP-2F62aqMVjJF0lBVGJ0Qad51nc7kJiSU9-2BoO2AZS-2FxWkWPc2I7LR1bK0xNJRHgwYUnnZx9CuJ998HDGs71LNtkOBuO3MJNrCgjaTKLSF2ugn6ZeRhIozMW68-3D)

[](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAaban164tTp-2FTjpcF-2FG8KJdPJX2RBI509i-2BZ3ZvIEjGM-2FXF_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23yn7k2e2s7Mm-2FU4KaBti8eNdbzvvCO9a6Khi03O-2FPWvCfX75Ps9CzuOl0vHtHt8UrwHNUg2BM14nDyRx8Oq1bVZOHjlePsvcTRxRMHuJWFg5rl96JW8gBLMYLIs9m9UE4HcKgcAV99ulG447yixSs-2Fl3uxIaI0gaRlCXT9R4aTQ9vRE4cWQwbl9sc99iXIZyStWZqMc8CAdxk-2BsYgYaay3sHek1MdPQUs047ani5OkuyzQvTH1hJA05aMFjxr2NNRuz-2BUyBn-2Bf0-2BPgNBYCpYnvVAZ2Qfz9KDeHMlANFGUA2IQHpmL2S2wiQ3n-2F-2F6eLGcS1PwucA5O3NWMKe-2FVIVRqEwfXK7sa0FlqbsMMn6KXv6Jhtq92HNK77sZr3Vk9oDbuI-3D)

The facts are so clear and overwhelming, that I don't need to say anything else about that for now. But please watch the [video](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAaban164tTp-2FTjpcF-2FG8KJdPJX2RBI509i-2BZ3ZvIEjGM-2FXF_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23yn7k2e2s7Mm-2FU4KaBti8eNdbzvvCO9a6Khi03O-2FPWvCfX75Ps9CzuOl0vHtHt8UrwHNUg2BM14nDyRx8Oq1bVZOHjlePsvcTRxRMHuJWFg5rl96JW8gBLMYLIs9m9UE4HcKgcAV99ulG447yixSs-2Fl3uxIaI0gaRlCXT9R4aTQ9hcc0vyMBcKwpULuWVmotHN4mVgoZL9dy3x4Fzy3CLHMYIZC3uU7QDTLawjNUS1AxrJhVBC7IOqxsVdZhEnp2iJIHxAniaj9puZXkx27yxoO9Appav583afVdDfl-2BZukwWw1cQThgju-2Bv2VNnwFrVS3ipbHSyP9ThPFKjS3lMe-2FujcxTBC1ZCGfoJAeLIfk8vomagYiWIN8WoFFpu8sZQb0-3D) and share it.

But two other quick points.

First, thank you! Even in the brief time since this attack has come out, I am heartened by the incredible response from veterans throughout Missouri and across the country. And thank you to all who reached out to Sheena and my family with encouraging words, texts, tweets and Facebook posts of support and encouragement. We are overwhelmed.

Second, I respect every member of the United States military for their service. Every Navy SEAL, every member of Naval Special Warfare, every sailor, soldier, coast guardsman, airman and Marine. I was proud to be a very small part of a much larger whole. One of the most disturbing parts of the video was not just the attack on me, but the idea that somehow certain service is better than others--like the video's implication that SEALs are better--and their awards are more valuable--than those of the US Marines, or the implication that someone in Djibouti is doing less valuable service than someone in Kenya. That mindset is ridiculous, petty, and I reject it completely.

The military is filled with servants whose dedication to country is awe-inspiring. I have tremendous respect for every Navy SEAL who has served, and also tremendous respect for everyone who wears or has worn the uniform. Everyone is critical to mission success--infantry, supply, logistics, administration, intelligence, aviation, special operations--if you wore the uniform of the United States of America, I honor your service. There are so many people who have given so much more than me. Many service members gave limbs, and far too many gave their lives. I honor and respect them all. One of the reasons that I founded The Mission Continues was to see that every returning veteran had a chance to live a life of purpose, dignity, and meaning when they returned, and that we honor those who have made the ultimate sacrifice, by seeing that their values of service, of sacrifice, and of hard work live on.
So while we correct the record -- and the video does that -- I also want to emphasize at the same time that I consider my own service to be a very small and humble part of a larger mission. I have respect for everyone who wears the flag of the United States of America.

God Bless You, and Let's Fight the Good Fight!

Eric

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: This is probably going to upset you
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Remember that kitchen sink? Here it comes...
The _Washington Post_ just reported that Hillary Clinton's largest super PAC is set to spend at least $5 million supporting her campaign in primary contests happening in the coming weeks.
This is the same super PAC that came up in last night's debate, the one "Clinton attempted to distance herself from," according to the _Washington Post._ The one that recently received $15 million in Wall Street and financial industry money to boost her campaign.
Here's the truth: our campaign is funded by more than 3.75 million contributions made by people like you, responding to emails like this one. You should be very proud of that fact. But if we're going to avoid getting beat by the crush of Clinton super PAC spending, we have to ask again:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign as a way of saying you have had more than ENOUGH of super PACs buying our candidates and elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/clinton-super-pac?refcode=em160212full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/clinton-super-pac?refcode=em160212full")
You know that the issue of money in politics is central to our campaign. It's one of the reasons we've come so far, so fast. It would be a shame if a super PAC flush with Wall Street cash is one of the reasons we come up just short in the contests ahead.
That's why your contribution is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/clinton-super-pac?refcode=em160212full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/clinton-super-pac?refcode=em160212full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
